gates.title: Real OpenAI GPT Image 2 API acceptance
acceptanceCriteria: Model discovery confirms gpt-image-2 is available to the tested key on the v0.3.0 release branch.
Text-to-image generation succeeds with real OpenAI Image API output.
Reference-image editing succeeds with real OpenAI Image API output.
Mask-based inpaint succeeds with real OpenAI Image API output.
Per-config streaming preview behavior is accepted or explicitly disabled for the tested endpoint.
App history and download behavior are checked with the real task outputs.

references.label: Real OpenAI GPT Image 2 external acceptance tracker

artifacts.description: Local v0.3.0 closeout report with mock OpenAI validation and streaming compatibility notes.

evidence.summary: Pending v0.3.0 real GPT Image 2 acceptance. Mock OpenAI verification and final closeout performance gates passed, but real-provider acceptance must be rerun with cost approval before publishing.

gates.title: Real Gemini / Nano Banana 3 API acceptance
acceptanceCriteria: Model discovery confirms a Nano Banana 3-compatible Gemini image model is available to the tested key on the v0.3.0 release branch.
Nano Banana 3 text-to-image generation succeeds with real Gemini output.
Reference-image editing succeeds with real Gemini output.
Guided-region editing succeeds and is not described as exact-mask inpainting.
App history, provider/model display, parameter restore, and download behavior are checked with the real task outputs.

references.label: Real Gemini / Nano Banana 3 external acceptance tracker

artifacts.description: Local v0.3.0 closeout report with mock Gemini validation and residual-risk notes.

evidence.summary: Pending v0.3.0 real Gemini/Nano Banana acceptance. Mock Gemini verification passed during closeout, but real-provider acceptance must be rerun with cost approval before publishing.

gates.title: Developer ID signed macOS release package
acceptanceCriteria: Developer ID signing is performed without exposing secret values.
macOS artifacts are built from the v0.3.0 release commit.
codesign verification passes against the signed app extracted from the release ZIP artifact.
macOS release verification passes against the signed artifact.
Apple notarization status is tracked separately in the macos-notarized gate.

references.label: Developer ID signed macOS distribution tracker

evidence.summary: Pending v0.3.0 Developer ID signed macOS artifacts. Local signing readiness found a valid code signing identity, but CSC_NAME and Apple notarization environment variables were not configured in the release shell, so no Developer ID signing has been attempted for v0.3.0 yet.

gates.title: Apple notarized macOS release package
acceptanceCriteria: Apple notarization credentials are available without exposing secret values.
macOS artifacts are submitted to Apple notary service successfully.
Notarization is stapled to the distributed DMG or app artifact.
spctl verification reports an accepted notarized Developer ID source.

evidence.summary: Blocked for v0.3.0 until APPLE_ID, APPLE_APP_SPECIFIC_PASSWORD, and APPLE_TEAM_ID are configured in the release environment. No notarization attempt has been made for v0.3.0.

gates.title: Native Windows release package validation
acceptanceCriteria: Windows package verifier runs in full native install mode on the v0.3.0 artifact.
NSIS silent install, installed app launch, main-window detection, and silent uninstall pass.
Packaged app can configure mock OpenAI and Gemini endpoints.
Download and open-folder behavior are checked on native Windows.

evidence.summary: Pending native Windows v0.3.0 package build and full-install verification. Prior v0.2.4 Windows evidence cannot be reused for the v0.3.0 release package.

gates.title: Native Linux desktop AppImage validation
acceptanceCriteria: Linux release verifier runs on a native desktop shell against the v0.3.0 artifact.
Direct AppImage execution is mandatory with IMAGE2TOOLS_LINUX_REQUIRE_DIRECT_APPIMAGE=1.
Packaged app can configure mock OpenAI and Gemini endpoints.
Download and open-folder behavior are checked on native Linux or explicitly justified by shared IPC evidence.

references.label: Native Linux desktop AppImage validation tracker

evidence.summary: Pending native Linux v0.3.0 package build and AppImage verification. Prior v0.2.0 Linux evidence cannot be reused for the v0.3.0 release package.

gates.title: Formal update manifest distribution assets
acceptanceCriteria: Distribution artifacts are uploaded to a public HTTPS v0.3.0 release URL.
docs/updates/latest.json contains matching asset URL, fileName, sha256, and sizeBytes metadata for v0.3.0.
Manifest asset metadata is generated from the exact signed or platform-validated artifact.
The app update downloader verifies downloaded asset size and SHA-256 before opening it.

references.label: Formal update manifest distribution asset tracker

artifacts.description: Current published update manifest remains on v0.2.4 until v0.3.0 assets exist.

evidence.summary: Pending v0.3.0 public release assets. docs/updates/latest.json intentionally remains on the current published v0.2.4 assets until v0.3.0 artifacts are uploaded and their hashes and byte sizes are verified.
